subcodes.first_line: O candle of love! If thou wishest to be a kindled flame in the glass of the Abha Kingdom, strive with self-sacrifice in this nethermost realm
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع حب اگر در زجاجه ملکوت ابهی شعله افروزی خواهی در این ناسوت ادنی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @love of God, @John the Baptist, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
